reviews.comment:
Si bien no me gustan los bares o restaurantes de las estaciones de servicio, los YPF Full son buenísimos, tranquilos, limpios y con buenas opciones para comer algo.

(Translated by Google)
While I don't usually like the bars or restaurants at gas stations, the YPF Full ones are great, quiet, clean and with good options for eating something.

reviews.comment:
Me siento estafado .
Hace anios tengo Serviclub y hasta el cambio que hizo ls empresa perdi mas de 1800 puntos.No puedo saber el total disponible por culpa de ls Empresa.Desaparecio toda informacion
Y esto es una Estafa. M.Z.

(Translated by Google)
I feel scammed.
I've had Serviclub for years, and until the company changed its system, I lost over 1800 points. I can't find out my total balance because of the company. All the information has disappeared.
This is a scam. M.Z.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBNUtXSmt3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Prolijo, completo, tiene todos los servicios para el auto y el automovilista.
Desde los surtidores hasta los box, siempre todo muy ordenado y prolijo.
Con la incorporación del metrobus en Av. Cabildo, sobre el lateral hay una dársena para facilitar el ingreso y no obstruir el tránsito.
Funciona también una oficina para socios del ACA.
Recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Neat and comprehensive, it has all the services a car and driver could need.

From the pumps to the service bays, everything is always very organized and tidy.
With the addition of the Metrobus on Av. Cabildo, there's a dedicated lane on the side to facilitate access and avoid obstructing traffic. There's also an office for ACA members. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBaGF5WHNRRRAB
